programme.title: The Listener

programme.title: The Listener
programme.desc: A routine trip to the hospital leads a wealthy businessman to lose his baby daughter after his SUV is hijacked.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: The team heads to New Orleans to track down a con artist posing as the wife of one of Jack's old CIA aliases; enemies of his old alias resurface looking for revenge.

programme.title: Why Did I Get Married Too
programme.desc: Four couples struggle to save their marriages once again on their annual marriage retreat.

programme.title: A Place in the Field
programme.desc: Veteran Gio Scuderi receives a package that sends him on a road trip to fulfill a promise and decide his fate.

programme.title: 6 Below: Miracle on the Mountain
programme.desc: When a snowstorm strands a man atop a mountain, he is forced to rediscover his faith in order to survive.

programme.title: Arthur the King
programme.desc: This is the true story of racer Michael Light and Arthur, a street dog who changes Michael’s life forever.

programme.title: Stronger
programme.desc: The inspiring true story of the real life 2013 Boston Marathon bombing survivor Jeff Bauman.

programme.title: Jack's Back [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: In a sickening coincidence -- or a sinister homage to actual crimes -- women are being murdered in Los Angeles 100 years after Jack the Ripper terrorized London. Police think John Westford, a young doctor, is the murderer, and when he's found hanging from a noose, authorities believe his apparent suicide is a tacit admission of guilt. But his twin brother, Rick (also Spader), insists John was killed, and, when it appears Rick is right, the investigation takes a stunning turn.

programme.title: 10th & Wolf [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: While serving in the military, a Marine sergeant (James Marsden) believes his family's ties to organized crime are a thing of the past. However, an act of insubordination and a visit from the F.B.I. send him packing to his South Philadelphia hometown, and he discovers that his brother (Brad Renfro) and his cousin (Giovanni Ribisi) have become entangled with mobsters, leaving him with only one way to save them.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A psychopathic killer is ravaging Memphis, Tennesse by murdering young women and Detective Jacob Stillwell is on the case. Known as the resident tough cop due to his aggressive tactics, he gets knocked sideways when his girlfriend becomes one of the murder victims. With his partner, Storm Anderson, in tow, Jacob casts the rules aside and infiltrates the seedy criminal underworld of the city looking to avenge his lover's death and put an end to the killings.

programme.title: Blind Horizon [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Found in the New Mexico desert with a head wound and total amnesia, Frank Kavanaugh (Val Kilmer) is brought to a hospital. When he recovers some of his memory, he begins raving about an upcoming assassination attempt on the president. Despite the man's unstable state, Sheriff Jack Kolb (Sam Shepard) is troubled by Frank's story. Discovering the truth grows more complicated when Chloe Richards (Neve Campbell) arrives and claims to be Frank's fiancée, even though he has no memory of her.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: The Crush
programme.desc: An obsessive teenage crush.

programme.title: The Nut Job
programme.desc: An incorrigibly self-serving exiled squirrel finds himself helping his former park brethren survive by raiding a nut store, a location that also happens to be a front for a human gang's bank robbery.

programme.title: The Nut Job 2: Nutty by Nature
programme.desc: When the evil mayor of Oakton decides to bulldoze Liberty Park and build a dangerous amusement park in its place, Surly Squirrel and his ragtag group of animal friends need to band together to save their home, defeat the mayor, and take back the park.

programme.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
programme.desc: King Arthur and his Knights of the Round Table embark on a surreal.

programme.title: Runaway (1984)
programme.desc: A cop of the future, an evil genius and a murderous robotic force in a deadly chase of runaway terror.

programme.title: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Dark passions explode in this steamy, sinister love story starring Rachel Ward and Jeff Bridges. Terry Brogan (Bridges), a cynical ex-football star, is hired to find Jessie Wyler (Ward), the runaway mistress of a ruthless L.A. nightclub owner, Jake Wise (James Woods). According to Jake, Jessie had stabbed him and vanished with $50,000. But Terry s mission is soon forgotten when he tracks down and falls in love with the beautiful Jessie on a Mexican island. Trouble brews, however, when Jake dispatches his henchman, Hank Sully (Alex Karras), to bring the lovers back. Driven by passion for the mysterious young woman, Terry quickly finds himself trapped in a complex web of corruption, betrayal,and murder. Packed with riveting excitement and vivid sensuality, AGAINST ALL ODDS grabs you and never lets you go.

programme.title: Desperate Measures
programme.desc: With a gravely ill son in desperate need of a bone marrow transplant, a police detective's only hope is to capture alive an escaped killer who is a perfect DNA match. Edited for TV

programme.title: First Daughter
programme.desc: A female Secret Service agent (Hemingway) goes against protocol to save the U.S. president from an assassination attempt.

programme.title: Jeanne Eagels
programme.desc: Actress Jeanne Eagels' troubled career takes her from Broadway stardom to drinking and drug abuse.

programme.title: Ten Cents A Dance
programme.desc: A taxi dancer tries to protect her impoverished husband from being jailed for embezzling money from his wealthy boss.

programme.title: You Can't Run Away From It
programme.desc: A spoiled heiress teams up with an enterprising reporter to escape her domineering father's plan to keep her from getting married.

programme.title: The Fuller Brush Man
programme.desc: A door-to-door salesman (Red Skelton) gets mixed up in murder.

programme.title: Port Afrique
programme.desc: An American expatriate searches for his wife's murderer in an exotic Moroccan port.

programme.title: K-19: The Widowmaker
programme.desc: When Russia's first nuclear submarine malfunctions on its maiden voyage, the crew must race to save the ship and prevent a nuclear disaster.

programme.title: The Rebound
programme.desc: Sandy, upon discovering her husband's infidelity while watching her son's birthday video, leaves the suburbs and moves into the city. She gets an apartment that's above a coffee house where she befriends one of the workers, Aram, a guy whose wife only married him so she could get a green card. Aram's family thinks he's wasting his life and education by working in the coffee house. Soon after moving into the apartment, Sandy hires Aram to be her nanny while she takes on work for the first time since her children were born. It isn't long when Aram and Sandy find they get along wonderfully and start to date. But the question is: is their relationship real or is it, in fact, just a rebound for both of them?

programme.title: Security
programme.desc: A security guard protects an eleven year-old girl who is being targeted by a gang for participating as a trial witness.

programme.title: Spotlight
programme.desc: Michael Keaton, Mark Ruffalo, and Rachel McAdams lead a critically acclaimed cast in this gripping true story about the Pulitzer Prize-winning investigation that uncovered a scandal that rocked one of the world's oldest and most trusted institutions. Delving into allegations of child abuse within the local Catholic Archdiocese, a tenacious team of Boston Globe reporters exposes a decades-long cover-up that reaches the highest levels of Boston's religious, legal, and government establishment.

programme.title: Dragged Across Concrete
programme.desc: Two embittered police detectives descend into the criminal underworld and find more than they wanted.

programme.title: Acts of Violence
programme.desc: When his fiancee is kidnapped by traffickers, Roman and his ex-military brothers set out to track her down.

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: A group of retired secret agents reunite when they are targeted by mysterious assassins.

programme.title: Red 2
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Frank Moses and his team of hapless heroes are tasked with finding a dangerous nuclear weapon

programme.title: Joe Baby
programme.desc: A money collector for a private investigator is hired to track down 10 million dollars stolen in a dodgy real estate deal, opening a complex can of worms.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Reawakening
programme.desc: John and Mary have lived in grief for ten years because their child, Clare, disappeared when she was fourteen. When Clare mysteriously returns, John suspects she's not who she claims to be, plunging the couple into a search for the truth.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Sword Master
programme.desc: A master swordsman must once again wield his weapon against those who threaten his desire to live in peace.

programme.title: The Emperor's Sword
programme.desc: After hiding a deadly sword that bestows great power upon its wielder, the emperor dies and a deranged rebel seizes power. Now, the young daughter of a great general is all that stands between a tyrant and his quest for domination.

programme.title: Fist of the Condor
programme.desc: A martial-arts master battles the world's greatest assassins to protect a sacred, ancient manual from falling into the wrong hands.

programme.title: The Final Master
programme.desc: With help from his apprentice (Song Yang), a Wing Chun practitioner (Liao Fan) must defeat eight martial arts academies before he can open his own school.

programme.title: Vengeance of an Assassin
programme.desc: An assassin escapes a battle and hides out in his childhood home. As he recovers, he realizes he has to fight faster and harder to survive.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: For seven years Christine Carter and Nicholas Francisco had the perfect marriage.

programme.title: Happy Face Killer

programme.desc: Explores the murders of executive Jose Menendez and his wife Kitty by their sons.

programme.desc: For seven years Christine Carter and Nicholas Francisco had the perfect marriage.

programme.title: Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: This Lifetime Original Movie follows the grisly true-crime story.

programme.title: Inspiring Love
programme.desc: When Isla’s art unexpectedly sells to Mark, a second commission sees them falling in love.

programme.title: Loving Every Minute
programme.desc: A watch that sets back time by five minutes, messes with Stephanie and Hunter’s budding romance.

programme.title: Dance Together
programme.desc: An injured dancer and a shy Deaf girl overcome bullies, disability stigma, and other high school obstacles.

programme.title: The Secrets of Comfort House
programme.desc: A murder investigation in a small town focuses on Wendy Sinclair, who runs a shelter for the victims' wives.

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of partying in Florida. Her trip turns into a wild saga involving a pimp, an idiot boyfriend, and Tampa's finest strip clubs in this film based on the greatest Twitter story ever told.

programme.title: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Edmund Perry has everything going for him after he graduates with a scholarship to attend Stanford. With his dedication paying off, an encounter with a police officer senselessly ends his life.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When an angel grants a struggling water girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) three wishes, even her mom (Robin Givens) or coach (Reginald VelJohnson) can't figure out how she became a soccer superstar.

programme.title: Unsecured
programme.desc: Bobby, haunted by the infidelity of his ex-wife, enters a new relationship with Lakeisha while grappling with deep-seated insecurities. Unbeknownst to Lakeisha, his past resurfaces when a witness claims to have seen him involved in a murder.

programme.title: Demon Time
programme.desc: William is going through a tumultuous time in his life following the death of his father, and the break up of his girlfriend. As he begins to put his life back together, he discovers his father left behind a substantial debt that could cost him his life. William must face is past, and discover not only his truth, but his father’s as well.

programme.title: He'll Still Never Let Go
programme.desc: In the wake of her abusive ex-boyfriend Karlton's disappearance, Candace seeks a fresh start. Just as she begins to open her heart to new love, Brandon, his reckless actions inadvertently expose her to danger, unaware that Karlton is silently watching. With her past closing in and her safety at risk, Candace must confront her deepest fears and fight to reclaim her freedom before Karlton's sinister plans destroy her chance at happiness.

programme.title: Bottled Lust
programme.desc: Jasmine and her friends embark on a girls trip, as well as mend her heartbreak. She then meets John and is hit with a wave of feelings and butterflies. But when John starts to show his true colors, the girls end up in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: A Wolf's Cries
programme.desc: Janice is a compulsive liar. In her new friend group, she causes chaos, breaking up couples and getting friends arrested. Believing she deserves everything; it's her way or the highway. Until someone sees her manipulation and aims to expose her.

programme.title: Planet Dune
programme.desc: A rescue mission on a desert planet turns deadly when they find the planet’s apex predators: giant sandworms.

programme.title: Alien Siege
programme.desc: Residents in a small town must fight alien soldiers hunting the U.S. President after his helicopter crashes.

programme.title: Universal Soldiers
programme.desc: Unstable and unstoppable genetically modified super soldiers escape from their maximum security holding cells.

programme.title: The Land That Time Forgot (2024)
programme.desc: Based on the gripping Science Fiction adventure. Present Day. Survivors of an American military vessel sunk by a Russian sub manage to capture the Russian sub after it surfaces. But now out of fuel, the sub makes its way to a tropical island. As those in the sub explore the island, they realize it is full of previously thought to be extinct creatures like dinosaurs, forcing them to survive the creatures and work together along with those who already live on the island to figure out a way off.

programme.title: Attila
programme.desc: When American soldiers steal Attila the Hun's secret riches, the wrath of the barbarian is awakened.

programme.title: The Final Wish
programme.desc: From the creator of the Final Destination franchise comes a new tale of death. Following the passing of his father, Aaron Hammond (MICHAEL WELCH) returns to his hometown to help his devastated mother (LIN SHAYE) and to confront his past demons. Sifting through his fathers belongings, Aaron comes upon a mysterious item that is far more than it seems.

programme.title: Blood Hook
programme.desc: Welcome to the 'Muskie Madness' fishing tournament. The local yokels are going insane and five students on vacation are in way over their heads. Peter's friend falls hook, line and sinker for the sexy tournament hostess. Meanwhile a crazed killer is using local jail bait as live bait. The murder weapon? An expertly cast barbed hook. The town sheriff won't admit anything's fishy, especially during the height of tourist season. Now it's up to Peter to reel in the fiendish fisher-of-menor become the catch of the day!

programme.title: Don't Kill It (Edited Version)
programme.desc: An ancient demon terrorizes a tiny Mississippi town.

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp (Edited Version)
programme.desc: After a terrible boating accident killed her family, shy Angela Baker (Felissa Rose, Return to Sleepaway Camp) went to live with her eccentric Aunt Martha and her cousin Ricky. This summer, Martha decides to send them both to Camp Arawak, a place to enjoy the great outdoors. Shortly after their arrival, a series of bizarre and violent accidents begin to claim the lives of various campers. Has a dark secret returned from the camps past or will an unspeakable horror end the summer season for all?

programme.title: The Final Wish
programme.desc: From the creator of the Final Destination franchise comes a new tale of death. Following the passing of his father, Aaron Hammond (MICHAEL WELCH) returns to his hometown to help his devastated mother (LIN SHAYE) and to confront his past demons. Sifting through his fathers belongings, Aaron comes upon a mysterious item that is far more than it seems.

programme.title: All Hallows' Eve
programme.desc: A babysitter finds a VHS tape which features various sinister murders performed by a psychotic clown.

programme.title: All Hallows' Eve 2
programme.desc: A woman finds a VHS tape that shows a series of gruesome tales that could be real. But the true danger is the pumpkin-faced killer that's using the tape to find his next victim.

programme.title: Vicious Fun
programme.desc: Vicious Fun

programme.title: Dark Glasses
programme.desc: After an eclipse, an escort crashes her car while fleeing a killer and loses her sight. Acting as her eyes is a young boy who survived the accident. But the killer won't give up his victim.

programme.title: Prevenge
programme.desc: Prevenge

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampette Look" - Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven. That only reinforces the Clampett's belief that the Fenwicks are poor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We’re here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you’re in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they’re going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they’re all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let’s see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We’ve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan’s Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We’re in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We’ve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They’re going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other’s strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world’s strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The Halloween celebrations kick off with guest Jeanette Donnarumma, former culinary producer for The Rachael Ray Show. Clinton Kelly attempts a spooky "Cheese Rat" appetizer made from cream cheese, curry powder, and mango chutney. The group laughs at the questionable rat shape, shares TV producer behind-the-scenes stories, and Jeanette shakes up an Apple Cider Margarita spritz.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's cozy comfort food season as Michael Symon cooks a hearty Beef and Butternut Squash Stew. While the meat braises, the hosts share their favorite podcasts to listen to while doing chores, universally bash the idea of the "Turducken", and discuss the possibility of a future Chewed Up cookbook.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's finally Halloween. Michael dresses up as a giant Minion while Carla Hall makes festive Graveyard Dirt Cups. Using a rich chocolate mousse, crushed cookies, and gummy worms, it's the perfect spooky dessert. The trio debates the merits of candy corn, reminisces about retro sweets, and Michael shares a hilarious story of chasing down an ice cream truck.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon whips up crispy homemade tater tots with a rich gruyere fondue dip. While frying the tots, the trio gets delightfully derailed when Michael accidentally misspeaks, leading to uncontrollable laughter. A grumpy Clinton complains about his restless legs, Carla relives a past cooking competition disaster, and the group answers fan mail about holiday crafts. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly embraces "sweater weather" by making a savory Butternut Squash, Spinach, and Blue Cheese Pie. While he cooks, the hosts discuss expensive clothing habits and the woes of tight pants. A cooking question about pie layers hilariously derails into a conversation about dating terminology, and Michael reveals he is passing the Thanksgiving hosting torch to his son. The episode concludes with Michael giving away a lucky golf putter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Carla Hall is making a comforting Peach Cobbler Pound Cake mashup. While Carla bakes, Michael Symon annoys Clinton Kelly with a deafening hand mixer. The trio discusses their favorite childhood holiday cookies, passionately debates whether black-and-white cookies are actually good, and shares ideas for crazy food mashups. The episode ends with a giveaway of a custom-designed apron from Carla.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly dodges cooking duty by bringing in guest Chef Leah Cohen to tackle a fan's fridge. Leah whips up incredible Chicken Lettuce Wraps using ground chicken, hoisin, and leftover rice. The hosts talk Pop-A-Shot basketball, picky kids, and Michael gives away a very meaningful piece of his restaurant history.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes on the Fan Fridge challenge, cooking from Pat in Peoria's refrigerator. He prepares a beautiful Pan-Roasted Salmon with crispy skin, served alongside a bright Greek-inspired salad of avocado, cucumber, olives, feta, and red curry paste. The crew jokes about Nick's organizing skills and reads fan mail.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Fan Fridge Week wraps up on Friday as Carla Hall transforms leftovers into a decadent Banana Bread French Toast. Using cottage cheese, oat milk, and eggs for a rich custard, she tops the sweet treat with a tart lemonade reduction, fresh berries, and chocolate syrup. The hosts discuss taking the show on the road in a van.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts celebrate their 25th show milestone with guest Chadwick Boyd, who elevates the classic Green Bean Casserole with caramelized onions, fresh beans, and a gruyere drop biscuit topping. While the casserole bakes, the crew debates mashed potato techniques, and Michael shares a hilarious story about how an AI misread his pan wall photo. A fan wins a Caraway pan set.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: A Fan Fridge rescue mission unfolds when a hypothetical Thanksgiving goes wrong. Michael Symon saves the day using Tammy's fridge ingredients to create a savory skillet of chicken thighs, Italian sausage, and sweet peppers. Meanwhile, the hosts share their current TV binges, Michael explains the meanings behind his tattoos, and Clinton sings "Brandy" for a fan. The episode wraps with a giveaway of Carla's measuring bowls.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest Danielle Sepsy of The Hungry Gnome joins the kitchen to bake her famous, plush Honey Corn Muffins. As the muffins bake, Clinton and Danielle test Carla and Michael's Long Island accents in a hilarious roleplay game. They also play Chew It or Screw It, share Thanksgiving food disaster stories, and give away a $75 gift card to Danielle's bakery to a fan in Virginia.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave and Chris talk about 3 keys to success before they are joined by iconic American chef Nancy Silverton. They discuss with Nancy how to follow your gut (literally and figuratively), make your own path, and work hard. After, Nancy joins for a fun MOIF where we hear some hot takes about desserts and Italian food from a master of both.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The largest indoor market in Budapest is also the most elegant in Europe! Spanning over three levels, the impressive central food market is long recognized as a marvel. Whether it be the freshest fish, the richest goose liver, or the sweetest paprika that you're looking for, you'll find it. But don't forget the basement: this is where you will find the very best pickled cabbage in the country!

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Food markets have a strong tradition in the Netherlands and many citizens count on their long street markets for their fresh food supplies. One of the oldest and most famous markets of the Netherlands is the Albert Cuyp Markt, a street market stretching along the upcoming (and "hip") neighborhood of de Pijp.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The Viktualienmarkt developed from an original farmers' market to a popular market for gourmets. The market also hosts a number of traditional and folkloric events. But the center of the social life of the city is the world-famous Biergarten - here the seven historical breweries of the city pour the finest beers of the world.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Set sail with Chef Walter Staib on a two-part adventure down the majestic Danube River! Part 1 charts a course through Germany and Austria, exploring stunning valleys amidst Europe's heart. Discover historic sites, artistic treasures, and culinary delights at every stop along this unforgettable journey.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Our journey continues through Austria, Slovakia, and ending in the Hungarian city of Budapest. We’ll marvel at architectural wonders and savor the flavors of the region with Chef Walter Staib as he prepares traditional meals aboard a luxurious cruise ship. Don't miss this unforgettable finale on the mighty Danube!

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Journey to St. John's, Newfoundland, to discover the deep connection locals have with nature's bounty, and meet inspiring individuals who fish, farm, and cook with generations of tradition. Savor unique recipes prepared over crackling fire-pits, including the king of St. John's cuisine: cod.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Join Chef Walter Staib on a journey to Colorado Springs, where we'll explore the history of this scenic landscape, from the indigenous Ute people through the era of homesteaders. At the Historic Rock Ledge Ranch, savor delicious recipes that have withstood the test of time. Don't miss out on this opportunity to experience the flavors and heritage of Colorado Springs!

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib visits Curacao to unravel the delicious stories behind this vibrant Caribbean island. We'll meet local chefs who share their culinary passion through mouthwatering dishes like stewed papaya, okra soup, and stuffed Dutch cheese. Unforgettable flavors and island adventures await as we explore Curacao's heritage and unique cuisine, making this an episode you won’t want to miss!

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib dives into the coastal bounty of Port Aransas, Texas! Discover legendary fishing tales, explore the vibrant local culture, and savor unique seafood creations with Chef Pete Mims. Experience how Texas spices meet Gulf Coast flavors in a culinary adventure that blends tradition and innovation. Join us for an unforgettable journey through the rich, diverse tastes of coastal Texas.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Saddle up for Southern charm as Chef Walter Staib rides through Nashville's history at Belle Meade Mansion. Explore the melodic roots of Country Music, visit iconic landmarks, and whip up delicious Southern eats like Country ham, fruitcake, and syllabub. Experience Nashville’s rich cultural heritage and culinary delights in this captivating journey.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Unveil Charleston's soul as we explore the layers of its history at the International African American Museum and a Lowcountry rice farm. Learn crabbing secrets from a local pro, then cook with a passionate chef, celebrating Southern staples of the local cuisine.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food

programme.desc: Season 2 premiere. Mar Jennings, known as America's Top Lifestyle Expert, is ready to renovate all the homes on his Westport, CT street. programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Season premiere part 2. Mar began a huge addition on the Nook, a 1930's saltbox, for his neighbors Bob and Andrea. But at the beginning of the dining and den walkthrough the homeowners were unreadable. Tune in to see if they will approve of Mar's progress and designs.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Master bedrooms and baths are things that dreams are made of until some nightmare hiccups happen. Turns out that visiting Broadway show sets provides unexpected inspiration. programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: In this outdoor transformation episode, Mar is thrilled to reveal the final touches on the Nook, a 1930's saltbox, for his neighbors Bob and Andrea. Complete landscaping, outdoor dining and patio, garage, driveway, gas lantern and so much more.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The holidays are in full swing on Mar's. Join America's Top Lifestyle Expert Mar Jennings and his home makeover team as they enjoy Westport CT during the holidays with activities like caroling, sleigh rides, shopping and more.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The transformation of a Westport CT mid-century bungalow picks up steam and the change is amazing. programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Bungalow transformation is complete and ready to reveal. It's down to the wire on finishing this home in time for an open house. Yvonne and Mar have overseen all the construction and renovation, but now there's a rush to finish the staging.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The transformation of a Westport CT street comes to a halt when Mar's own home suffers some unexpected damage. But that means an all-new kitchen. Team Mar may not be able to cope with this one, especially when the project seems to keep on growing.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show

They find themselves at the mercy of Jose Esqueda (Anthony Quinn), a local bandit who has terrorized the town with his adoptive brother, Rio (Robert Taylor). Rio is kidnapped when he tries to mount an attack on the ranch and agrees to work for Cameron so he can be close to Cordelia. Though he's incensed at Rio's betrayal, Jose vows to get him back.

programme.title: Saddle the Wind
programme.desc: Steve Sinclair (Robert Taylor) is a former gunfighter and soldier who left his violent ways behind him after the Civil War. Since then, he has settled down as a rancher in a small Western town. But his easygoing life is turned upside down when his unstable little brother, Tony (John Cassavetes), shows up with his bride-to-be, Joan (Julie London). While Steve has given up his gun-toting ways, Tony has not, and his violent tendencies lead to trouble for the entire town.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: As a tornado bears down on Turkey's Iztuzu Beach, Sevgi wants to bury sand nest for the endangered Loggerhead turtle eggs and save them from the wind. So Jett delivers her a set of digging tools. Jett flies to Sainte-Marguerite Island and delivers an inflatable boat to a boy named Emile. Emile needs the boat to bring a giant robot statue that he made out of lemons to be a float in a parade.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When Grand Albert loses his camera that has the ability to make things bigger or smaller it's found by a girl in Egypt who is babysitting her baby brother. The camera turns him into a giant baby. A boy, Henri, is given a riding toy truck by his goofball Dad. When it gets dirt, Jett brings a Car Wash Kit to them and together they wash all the dirty cars/trucks in town.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett is excited as he is ready to go on his 300th mission and if he is successful, he will go into the SW Hall of Fame and become a Legendary Super Wing. Jett has to control the fallout from Golden Boy's interference which has lead to the release of a 'dinosaur' from an iceberg in Greenland. The dinosaur takes off with Eric, a local boy that Jett had come to Greenland to help.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Laerke wants to tune-up an old steam locomotive so he can join his friends at the Danish Railway Museum. Jett delivers a train repair kit. Niphavanh needs a large flower basket for That Luang, the biggest festival in Laos. There, Niphavanh will circle the Pha That Luang monument and make a wish: to visit outer space! Jett delivers, as always, but complications arise when Golden Boy appears.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Finnley, winner of the "One Day Delivery Experience" comes to World Aircraft to go on a delivery with Jett! The delivery takes them to Shanghai, China, where a girl named Yenching needs an action camera to film a cooking video. While Astra is working at her space station, Golden Boy learns that all delivery orders are patched through her satellite. He and Golden Wheels take over the station.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Helen needs a torch pod for the opening torch relay ceremony of the International Children’s Games. She needs the Super Wings to perform the torch relay! When her elephant sanctuary floods in Chiang Mai, Thailand, Kulap orders elephant-sized life jackets and water wings so she can guide the elephants to safety. A baby white elephant is separated from the group and carried away by water currents.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Abu is exploring the excavations at Petra in Jordan with his uncle. But there's a big problem: he forgot to bring along one of his prized toy robots. Jett flies to Erfoud, Morocco, and delivers a fossil detector to a boy named Kamal who wants to find a rare fossil to complete his collection. Jett and Kamal find themselves in an underground lake with a live, ancient whale called a Basilosaurus!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers recycling boxes to George, a young boy who worries that the dirty beaches of Mantanani Island will stop his friend Duggy the Dugong from visiting. Jett, George, and his Grandpa discover an island of rubbish floating in the sea. Jett delivers a telescope to Amélie who is at the Louvre Museum with her mom. Things go awry when the Mona Lisa is stolen...and Amélie's mom disappears, too!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy named Riley is in Singapore visiting his friend Lifen who is a local movie star. Golden Boy is a huge fan of Lifen's and wants to be in the movie with her.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Maggie wants to be a buddy-cop-duo with her pet Chihuahua, Kiki, and help people in need. So, Jett delivers police costumes and joins them in patrolling the town. Jett flies to Hamburg to deliver a pair of mini vacuum cleaners to help Lars and his Dad clean up a spillage of popcorn across their impressive model village. They have trouble reaching popcorn inside the village's train tunnel.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Peiru and her dad are hiking the Great Wall of China in Beijing. Heavy snowfall has made the Great Wall difficult to traverse, so Peiru orders winter hiking gear. Dale wants to be in an underwater bike race with his dad, and help him win. So Jett delivers a tandem bicycle and agrees to join their team. Things take a turn when Golden Boy enters the race and sends them off-course.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A toddler in South Korea named Ha-Jun has a cold but doesn't like the taste of the medicine that his Dad needs to give him. Ha-Jun's sister Yuna calls the Super Wings for help. A boy named Geir in Iceland goes with his Mom on a tour to see arctic foxes in their natural habitat. Geir orders an arctic fox costume to wear so the shy foxes will come out of their caves and meet him.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a huge inflatable sword to Neele, an accessory for the balloon version of the legendary dragon-fighter Siegfried she is flying with her Papa in the annual balloon festival. Fabio loves soccer but he is not interested in history. At the San Augustin Archeological Park, he accidentally drops his ball into one of the sites with many ancient statues! Jett delivers him a stretchy claw.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a girl named Alani notices that the sea level is rising around the island of Tuvalu she orders a huge lifeboat for all the people in her village to ride on. Jett finds himself stuck in ice in Antarctica courtesy of Golden Boy, Golden Wheels, and a giant Golden Robot. He is rescued by World Aircraft and learns that Golden Boy has caused lots of global warming problems around the planet.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A passenger airplane bound for Italy has to make an emergency landing on World Aircraft. When Lime offers to prepare a meal for the passengers, Mano, a young boy passenger, makes a popular suggestion: pizza! Ratu and his Dad are excited about a "survival challenge" on one of Fiji's Desert Islands, but they forgot to bring their survival guide to teach them how to filter water!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers flowery mooncakes to Meilin, a young girl who wants to celebrate the Mid-Autumn Festival by leaving a gift for the Moon Lady, who is said to descend from the moon according to Chinese folklore. A girl named Emma lives in Transinne, Belgium and she asks the Super Wings if they can help her with her solar system school project.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Astra and Rover continue to help Emma, her Dad, and spaceship Rick see the solar system. Trouble is Golden Boy and Golden Wheels tag along! Jett delivers a claw grabber to Marcia, a little girl playing a treasure hunt game in which she searches for hidden treasure notes in the Rio Abiseo National Park in Peru. Our Super Wing helps her in her search!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets encounter three pandas on a country road in Chengdu, China. They try to help get the pandas off the highway and back to the panda centre. A girl asks the Super Wings for help in locating a dolphin in the waters off Iceland. Jett and Paul deliver a sonar device that can track dolphin whistles.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the wonderful world of water and deep dive into all the amazing creatures that call the ocean home. Learn simple words about the sea like water, coral reef, and ocean through narration and repetition. Engaging live-action footage of your favorite ocean friends and classical melodies will dazzle your little explorer as they experience the magical world under the sea.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Bob The Train Shorts- Stories for Kids
programme.desc: Bob the Train is a fun-loving, curious & inquisitive cartoon train. He loves to teach through stories and educational cartoon kids videos. Come enjoy Bob shorts filled with music, kids songs & baby videos.

programme.title: Bob the Train Shorts - Kids Cartoon Show
programme.desc: Bob the Train is a fun-loving, curious & inquisitive cartoon train. He loves to teach through stories and educational cartoon kids videos. Come watch Bob shorts filled with music, kids songs & baby videos.

programme.title: Bob The Train Kids TV - Fun Learning Show
programme.desc: Bob the Train one of kids favorite characters showcases and stars in a fun series that focusses on children learning Colors, Shapes, ABC, Numbers and more with the help of surprise eggs, soccer balls and cars. Happy Learning Kids!

programme.title: Bath Song & Fun Kid Songs - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Kids songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While in the midst of a cake decorating demonstration at the café, the girls are uncharacteristically interrupted by an excited Princess Berrykin. She announces the Berrykins have decided to revive the old tradition of the Berry Bitty Buggy Derby. While the girls enthusiastically recount the stories they've heard about it and ask the Princess questions, Blueberry, carrying enough books to block her view, comes through the door and unknowingly interrupts the Princess.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The grove around Berry Bitty City is abuzz with activity. The Berrykins are using their sparkles to harvest berries, Berrykin Bloom is in his garden spraying flowers with a special solution to make them larger, and Raspberry is nearby gathering flower petals to make perfume. The wind starts to blow and picks up some of the sparkles. The sparkles float along the wind and get combined with some of Berrykin Bloom's solution.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls are all gathered at the café. Strawberry is experimenting making applesauce from scratch with a mallet (and making a mess) while the rest busily make their own wrapping paper and bows for the annual gift exchange they hold in celebration of First Frost. Mr. Longface stops by and Strawberry offers him some fresh applesauce but he declines, as he doesn't care for it. He's only there for some tea and, being that he's new in town, doesn't know what the group is up to.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While working in her store, Orange overhears the Berrykins laughing and shouting outside. When she goes to the door to investigate, a clump of dandelion fluff gets blown inside chased by three Berrykins. She watches as they head butt the clump around until it floats back toward Orange. Just as it floats close, she gives it a bat sending it outside and the Berrykins happily chasing after it. Wanting in on the fun, she joins them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While enjoying lunch in the café, the girls are interrupted by some music coming from the gazebo. They head outside and find Sadiebug and Kadiebug wearing badges and standing by a banner and podium. A group of chairs are set up in front of them. The twins begin to announce, and then argue, that they are starting a club - a good citizens club. The girls are shocked as the twins argue with each other all the time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With all the Baby Berrykins running around Berry Bitty City, Princess Berrykin decides to build a Day Care Center and playground. But she's worried because it's dull-looking - all grey metal and brown wood. She asks Strawberry whom might be good to help her out. And two names immediately come to her mind - Lemon and Raspberry! The Princess confesses she's always admired their sense of design and style.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: After returning to the café after a walk with her pets, Strawberry is met by Mr. Longface. He's been waiting for her so that they can get started making treats and decorating for Sadiebug's and Kadiebug's party that afternoon. But Custard and Pupcake have enjoyed their time outside so much that they want to continue playing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest; she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Dad's Secret War: France 1944
programme.desc: Narrated by actor Kevin Bacon, Dad’s Secret War: France 1944 focuses on two top-secret World War II organizations – the OSS (Office of Strategic Services) and the British SOE (Special Operations Executive), American and British organizations responsible for silent, unseen, highly classified missions of critical importance to defeating the Nazis. The documentary shares the riveting, true story of an American who joined the British SOE and was parachuted into France with a small team just after D-Day to organize the French Resistance into a cohesive army. The mission was to stop Germany's most feared troops from reaching Normandy in the days after the D-Day landings of June 6, 1944.

programme.title: World War II: Saving the Reality
programme.desc: Narrated by Dan Aykroyd. Tells the story of an individual who owns the largest private collection of World War II artifacts in the world. Over 50 interviews with veterans and survivors of the war help tell the story of the meaning of the over 7,000 individual items in the collection of Kenneth W. Rendell.

programme.title: Unsettled History: America, China, and the Doolittle Tokyo Raid
programme.desc: The Doolittle Raiders were one of the most famous American aviation units of World War II. The new documentary UNSETTLED HISTORY: AMERICA, CHINA AND THE DOOLITTLE TOKYO RAID examines a key moment in American/Chinese history, exploring how the two sides recall a daring 1942 raid on Tokyo, and how this shared event is remembered in different ways, the reasons for this divergence and what lessons it may hold for today. In the film, the memory of the Raiders is kept alive by their children and grand-children, as well as by descendants of the courageous Chinese men and women who rescued many of them from likely capture, torture, or even death at the hands of the Japanese military. On April 18, 1942, sixteen U.S. Army aircrews embarked on their first combat mission. They had enough fuel to reach their targets -- military and industrial sites in Tokyo and five other Japanese cities but not enough to go much farther. Even if they somehow made their way to the relative safety of China, no one knew they were coming. In 2018, the children of the Doolittle Raiders visited China, to literally walk in their fathers footsteps. But is this mission remembered in China as heroic or misguided? And what kind of reception did they receive at a time when US/China relations were bad, and getting worse? One historical event, two different narratives.

programme.title: A Ripple of Hope
programme.desc: On April 4th, 1968, civil rights leader Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. was shot and killed in Memphis, Tennessee. As news of his assassination spread, American cities were engulfed in chaos and fear. Urban areas erupted in riots and fires burned out of control. Dozens of people were killed. Meanwhile, presidential candidate Robert F. Kennedy was in Indianapolis, where he was scheduled to make a campaign appearance in an African-American neighborhood. Kennedy wanted to deliver the news to the people. But local police warned him, they won't be able to provide protection if the people rioted. Kennedy wrote out some brief notes and then courageously gave a moving plea for peace and reconciliation on the back of a truck. It would eventually be regarded as one of the great political speeches of the twentieth century.With digitally restored news footage and original music by Grammy Award winning composer John Colby, A RIPPLE OF HOPE draws on interviews with Kennedy aides and associates, as well as everyday people who were in the crowd that night, to tell the story of an inspiring moment in American history.

programme.title: America's Socialist Experiment
programme.desc: A revealing look at 40 years of socialism in one of Americas conservative cities, Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Between 1910 and 1960, elected socialists including a U.S. Congressman and three mayors reduced corruption, improved conditions for working people, and cleaned up the environment, leaving a mixed legacy to which both Democrats and Republicans lay claim today.

programme.title: America's Secret War
programme.desc: While the United States was publicly engaged in the Vietnam War, a secret military operation under the command of the CIA was being waged in the neighboring nation of Laos. At a concealed airbase in the heart of the country, the CIA trained an army of allied guerilla fighters to destroy enemy supply lines. AMERICA'S SECRET WAR uncovers the history of this covert mission.

programme.title: The Misty Experiment: The Secret Battle for the Ho Chi Minh Trail
programme.desc: THE MISTY EXPERIMENT: THE SECRET BATTLE FOR THE HO CHI MINH TRAIL is an hour-long documentary that profiles a special U.S. Air Force squadron whose pilots volunteered for one of the wars most dangerous air missions. Their assignment: search for enemy supply transports and anti-aircraft installations concealed within the web of trail paths and waterways collectively known as the Ho Chi Minh Trail. The squadron also directed on-site rescue operations for U.S. and allied aircrews shot down while flying over the jungles of North Vietnam and Laos.The activities of Operation Commando Sabre, the official name of the mission, were classified as top secret during and immediately following the war. This documentary shares the story of the Misty squadron as told solely through the recollections of the veterans who volunteered for the mission. Their stories are enhanced by never-before-seen squadron footage and general archival combat footage from the war.

programme.title: Classic Fireplace
programme.desc: The beloved traditional yule log that started it all. Gentle flames dance over seasoned wood, filling your home with nostalgic warmth and timeless holiday comfort.
